attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ASSIGNMENT_ID, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ASSIGNMENT_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.MULTIPLE_STATUS_FLAG, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.RECORD_VERSION_NUMBER, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.STATUS_CODE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.PROJECT_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.PROJECT_ROLE_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.RESOURCE_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.PROJECT_PARTY_ID, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.DESCRIPTION USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.START_DATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.END_DATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ASSIGNMENT_EFFORT, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.EXTENSION_POSSIBLE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ASSIGNMENT_TEMPLATE_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.MIN_RESOURCE_JOB_LEVEL, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.MAX_RESOURCE_JOB_LEVEL, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ADDITIONAL_INFORMATION USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.WORK_TYPE_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.REVENUE_CURRENCY_CODE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.REVENUE_BILL_RATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.EXPENSE_OWNER, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.EXPENSE_LIMIT, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.EXPENSE_LIMIT_CURRENCY_CODE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.FCST_TP_AMOUNT_TYPE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.FCST_JOB_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.LOCATION_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.CALENDAR_TYPE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.CALENDAR_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.RESOURCE_CALENDAR_PERCENT, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE1, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE2, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE3, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE4, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE5, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE6, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE7, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE8, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE9, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE10, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE11, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE12, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE13, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE14, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ATTRIBUTE15, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.CREATION_DATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.CREATED_BY, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.PENDING_APPROVAL_FLAG, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.FCST_JOB_GROUP_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.EXPENDITURE_ORG_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.EXPENDITURE_TYPE_CLASS, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.EXPENDITURE_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.APPRVL_STATUS_CODE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.NOTE_TO_APPROVER, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.STAFFING_PRIORITY_CODE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.TEMPLATE_FLAG, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.NO_OF_ACTIVE_CANDIDATES, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.MASS_WF_IN_PROGRESS_FLAG, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.BILL_RATE_OVERRIDE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.BILL_RATE_CURR_OVERRIDE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.MARKUP_PERCENT_OVERRIDE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.TP_RATE_OVERRIDE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.TP_CURRENCY_OVERRIDE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.TP_CALC_BASE_CODE_OVERRIDE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.TP_PERCENT_APPLIED_OVERRIDE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.MARKUP_PERCENT, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.SEARCH_MIN_AVAILABILITY, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.SEARCH_COUNTRY_CODE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.SEARCH_EXP_ORG_STRUCT_VER_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.SEARCH_EXP_START_ORG_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.SEARCH_MIN_CANDIDATE_SCORE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.LAST_AUTO_SEARCH_DATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ENABLE_AUTO_CAND_NOM_FLAG, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.COMPETENCE_MATCH_WEIGHTING, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.AVAILABILITY_MATCH_WEIGHTING, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.JOB_LEVEL_MATCH_WEIGHTING, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.RATE_DISC_REASON_CODE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.TRANSFER_PRICE_RATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.TRANSFER_PR_RATE_CURR, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.STAFFING_OWNER_PERSON_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.RESOURCE_LIST_MEMBER_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ORIG_SYSTEM_CODE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ORIG_SYSTEM_REFERENCE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS,
 (
 select ASSIGNMENT_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS
 minus
 select ASSIGNMENT_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ASSIGNMENT_ID = STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.ASSIGNMENT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME
